steps.title: Use the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to specify the number of gray wolves in Yellowstone. The notes state that since reintroduction, the number of gray wolves in the park has stabilized at roughly 100.

steps.title: Reject missing counts
steps.content: A gives the reintroduction year but no current number. B says wolves lived there as of 1995 but gives no count. C defines carrying capacity instead of specifying Yellowstone's wolf population. The needed sentence gives roughly 100 wolves. The answer is D.
